_meta.protocol: v3 probe map — record-and-replay ledger for delta-only probing
_meta.build: round-12 retrofit close-out (post lane A/B/C + viewmodel fix)
_meta.purpose: One entry per feature area: the hook calls that verify it, the exact expected observations, and the gotchas that cost prior probers tool calls. Future probes verify NEW surface only and replay this map for everything else. Sources: round-9/10/11 panel probe sections + the round-12 retrofit session.
global_quirks: brk() is a creative-style instant break that BYPASSES the tool gate (doBreak drop=true). Never cite brk() for drop-gating claims — use mineHold + step (bare hand ~2.2s no drop on stone brick, wood pick ~0.7s with drop).

place() returns undefined, not a boolean — read the block id back to confirm. place() silently no-ops with zero items of the selected type, torches need a supporting face (shaft side-walls refuse), and placement rays hit non-solid deco (a grass tuft can eat the ray and the block lands ON TOP of the tuft).

rAF starvation (headless tab): native rAF fires ~never until a screenshot forces a BeginFrame. Recipe: replace window.requestAnimationFrame with a callback-capturing stub, take one screenshot to force a frame (the loop re-registers into your stub), then drive the captured callback synchronously with +16.7ms timestamps. __vox.step() advances the SIM but does NOT run chunk gen or render — boot gen and canvas updates need driven rAF frames. HUD FPS 0-18 in headless screenshots is an artifact; perf().build avg is the honest number.
setCam() does not suspend physics — toggle fly first (key('F')) or gravity pulls you off the staged position.

Shore columns near spawn reject spawnAt as 'water' (honest vocab, r10 caveat e; reconfirmed r12 at (120,112) and (150,140)). Gating tests need genuinely inland cells — (490,445) by the hamlet is proven dry.

Stale HUD frame: HUD text (clock, FPS, XYZ) only updates on rendered frames. After setTime/setCam without driving frames, screenshots show stale HUD values over a correct 3D scene — trust skyInfo()/getState(), not the HUD string.

eat(id) can return false for items give()'d into deep inventory (r12: give(119) then eat(119) false while invFull showed the item; berries give(118)+eat(118) worked). Prefer real drops/pickups or verify hotbar slot before citing an eat failure.
API drift history: findCavePocket returns an ARRAY of pockets; spawnCaveAt takes (x,z) not (type,x,y,z) (r9).
The suite (?suite=1) mutates the world — run it on a fresh page only, and never probe on a post-suite instance.

Viewport resize: the renderer picks up new dimensions only after a window resize event + a driven frame. The headless preview can boot at extreme aspect (147x899 observed r12) — resize to 1280x800 before judging visuals.
key('1'..'9') hotbar selection: getState().selected reports the selected ITEM ID, not the slot index.

expected.spawn_col: grass(1) at y28, air at y29 at (116,115)

known_quirks: bit-identical across r9-r12 despite the r11 breadth pack touching worldgen; any drift fails the suite world-hash first
torch placement needs a supporting face — shaft side-walls silently refuse (aim at floor-adjacent cells)
field-wide model: 96.9% exact agreement vs ray-march, disagreements are corner-graze oc-class boundaries only (r9)

hooks: place + interact + block id reads (synchronous, same eval)

expected.ids: lever 25/26, wire 27/28, lamp 29/30, door lower 31/33 upper 32/34, button 42/43, rs-torch 44/45
expected.wire_decay: source power 15, minus 1 per wire step: wires 1-14 powered (28), wire 15+ dead (27)
expected.propagation: instant on edit — read ids synchronously in the same eval as interact(), zero frames needed
expected.button_release: 1.5 sim-seconds, timer rides simNow (held frozen 18.3 wall-clock s under pause, r11)
expected.lamp_light: lit lamp joins torch registry: torches() +1, 0.857 at 1 block, gates hostile spawns, persists save/reload

known_quirks: any network update slams manually-opened doors toward dp (r11 hunter, documented substitution)
wire can land on a grass tuft (non-solid support) if the placement ray grazes it

expected.matrix: {16:2}->100 sticks n4; {16:4}->17 table; {16:6}->115 plank armor; {16:5}->31 door; {16:3,24:3}->35 bed; {100:3,24:2}->117 bow; {3:5}->23 furnace; {3:4}->41 stone bricks n4; {4:4}->40 sandstone; {3:1}->42 button; {3:1,100:1}->25 lever; {10:1}->27 wire n4; {10:2,16:2}->29 lamp; 1 log->4 planks; picks 3 mat+2 stick; swords 2 mat+1 stick; 5 ingots->116 iron armor; stick+coal->4 torches; 3 wheat->bread
expected.semantics: most-specific-wins, zero shadowing (13+ recipe matrix re-resolved r11), exact input consumption

known_quirks: suite craft-matrix covers 23 recipes — replay there, only probe NEW recipes

expected.rotten_flesh: +3 hunger, 8s poison at -1 hp per 2s (4 total), 1-hp floor, never lethal, clean expiry
expected.regen: +1 hp ticks at high hunger — can contaminate damage-step readings (r10 caveat b: a -3 arrow step reads -2)

known_quirks: eat(id) may return false when the item sits in deep inventory (r12); use real pickups or hotbar-verified slots

expected.armor: flat reduction: plank -1, iron -2; durability charged only to the BEST worn tier

known_quirks: +1 hunger-regen between samples can make a -3 step read -2; sample faster or pin hunger low

expected.sunburn: noon surface skeleton burns to death within ~2.5s sim

known_quirks: shore columns reject as 'water' — the single most repeated prober trap (r10, r12 x2); go inland
spawnCaveAt takes (x,z)

expected.sheep: 8 hp / 2 bare dmg = exactly 4 hits; flees on first hit; drops wool 24 (+ raw mutton 119 since r11)
expected.skeleton: kites holding range, shoots every ~2s (LOS), 3-dmg arrows, ~50% stick drop
expected.bow: craft 117; -3 per arrow (between hand 2 and wood sword 4); 0.6s+ cooldown; -1 dur per shot; shared 8-cap arrow pool; never self-hits
expected.corpse_run: death drops ALL occupied slots as distinct full stacks (durability preserved) within ~4 blocks, inventory wiped to 36 nulls, 300s window vs 60s ordinary Q-drops, recover by standing at site

known_quirks: mob containment: non-finite inputs rejected (suite mob-containment)
drop rates are binomial — 1-in-4 against 50% nominal is not a fail

expected.interact_day: spawnset + nosleep cues, clock unchanged, 'Spawn point set' toast
expected.interact_night: spawnset + sleep, gt jumps forward-only to next dawn (e.g. 268 -> 468)
expected.loaded_boot: world spawn anchored independently of save position (r11 verified_fail if(!SV) drift FIXED lane A r12; suite load-spawn-anchor)

known_quirks: the r11 find: pre-fix, post-reload world spawn = wherever you stood at save time — regression-watch this on any save-path lane

hooks: block id + gt + torches() reads post-load

expected.roundtrip: edits, inventory, gt (exact, e.g. 327.05), furnaces, chests persist
expected.redstone: circuit ids bit-identical; lit lamp re-registers in light registry (0.857) and re-gates spawns; mid-press button re-arms then auto-expires cleanly
expected.world: sandstone markers, harvested bush state (39) persist; berry-bush regrow re-arms on load (r11 hunter bug fixed lane A r12, index.html:1679)

known_quirks: corpse-run drops are never saved (reload forfeits them) — by design
iframe roundtrip needs the three.js CDN; suite has a 45s honest timeout

expected.opacity: held block fully opaque vs noon open ocean, vs sky+sun+clouds, vs midnight dark water (r12 retrofit fix verified with screenshots, all four adversarial framings)
expected.swap_latency: vm.id updates on the NEXT DRIVEN FRAME after selection change (one-frame render-pass latency, no mixed/ghost state mid-frame)

known_quirks: dedicated render pass since the r12 fix lane (water-transparency human bug); suite viewmodel-api checks state shape only — opacity stays screenshot territory
headless: drive at least one frame after key() before screenshotting or you capture the previous held block

expected.gt_map: gt 0 = deep night (starOp 1, #03050e); ~150 dawn transition (sun appears); 250-350 full day (#73adfc); noon ~ 300; sleep targets next dawn at +200-forward (e.g. 468)
expected.storm_dim: weather episodes dim the sky (weather-schedule-hash deterministic)

known_quirks: setTime argument is ABSOLUTE gt, not a 0-1 fraction (setTime(0.5) lands in night)
driving thousands of frames advances gt — re-pin time right before screenshots
HUD clock string is stale until a rendered frame

expected.peaks: break ~.29-.31, place ~.33, chirp ~.03, rain ~.03, step ~.02, bow ~.11, arrowhit ~.19, poison ~.07, caveamb ~.04 — all nonzero
expected.caveamb: triggers underground only (sky exposure ~0.2 yes, 1.0 no)
expected.refuse: fires on blocked placements (no silent dead right-clicks)

known_quirks: audioCheck passes vacuously if OfflineAudioContext missing (never in the marathon preview)

expected.heap: 33-48 MB after a full probe session
expected.errors: [] across heavy probing (rAF hijack, deaths, reloads); console clean except the known three.js r160 deprecation warning

known_quirks: PERF DEBT: chunk Map never evicts (carried since ~r3, scheduled r13) — mem().chunks growth is the observable
HUD FPS in headless screenshots is meaningless; rd-fps foreground measurement is a human-checkpoint item (r11 hunter evidence-rot flag)

expected.suite: SUITE PASS 71/71, world_hash 911b6032, ~6s; greppable 'ERROR <id> <reason>' per failure
expected.boot: overlay #ov display none + #prog hidden when gen complete; boot gen needs DRIVEN rAF frames (step() alone stalls at a fixed %)

known_quirks: suite is fresh-page-only (mutates world)
__suite.run() re-runs only on a pristine boot
mouse-look CORE remains human-checkpoint territory (OS pointer-lock unreachable headless; synthetic shadow only)
